Quiz_1.Question: How many public art installations are located across Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center, Hall 1 and Hall 2?

Options.A: Light Wall is located in Hall 2.
Options.B: Song of the Four Seasons is located in Hall 2.
Options.C: In Between Thinking is located in Hall 1.

Quiz_2.Question: Which of the following descriptions regarding the locations of the public art installations is INCORRECT?

Options.A: Tempered glass, steel cables, and fluorescent lights
Options.B: Handmade glass, stainless steel cables, and LEDs
Options.C: Handmade mirrored glass, steel frame, and LEDs
Options.D: Specially treated thick glass and wooden beams

Quiz_3.Question: What are the primary materials used in the artwork "Transcendence"?

Options.A: The Realm of Infinity (天人境界)
Options.B: Chronicles of Mountain and Form (山．形．誌)
Options.C: Infinite Nature and Self (物我無限)

Quiz_4.Question: Which public art installation is themed around the concept of "Nine"?
